goal: Read through the schema files in /Users/russ/Documents/super intelligence app/second_brain/schema and map out the core components and their interactions.

plan_steps.description: Read through the schema files in /Users/russ/Documents/super intelligence app/second_brain/schema and map out the core components and their interactions.

spoken_summary: I've mapped out the schema — looks like the core components include Agents, Tasks, Tools, and Memory, all connected through a central Orchestrator that coordinates execution and state management. The system uses a modular architecture where each component has defined inputs and outputs that flow through the Orchestrator's event system.
